message:
fix(cli): add -d, --parent, -e flags to br q; warn on list truncation

br q (quick create) was silently ignoring description, parent, and
estimate flags that br create supports. Now:
- -d/--description/--body sets the issue description
- --parent creates a parent-child dependency (validates parent exists,
  generates child ID like parent.1, parent.2, etc.)
- -e/--estimate sets estimated_minutes

Also adds a stderr warning when br list output is truncated by the
default 50-item limit, so agents and users know to use --limit 0
for full results.

Closes #135

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1016,6 +1016,18 @@ pub struct QuickArgs {
     /// Labels to apply (repeatable, comma-separated allowed)
     #[arg(long, short = 'l', add = ArgValueCompleter::new(label_completer))]
     pub labels: Vec<String>,
+
+    /// Description
+    #[arg(long, short = 'd', visible_alias = "body")]
+    pub description: Option<String>,
+
+    /// Parent issue ID (creates parent-child dep)
+    #[arg(long, add = ArgValueCompleter::new(issue_id_completer))]
+    pub parent: Option<String>,
+
+    /// Time estimate in minutes
+    #[arg(long, short = 'e')]
+    pub estimate: Option<i32>,
 }
 
 #[derive(Args, Debug, Default)]
